description: IntakeQ/PracticeQ MCP connector with HIPAA §164.312(b) audit logging on every PHI read/write
name: io.github.oktopeak/intakeq-mcp

environmentVariables.description: IntakeQ API key (optional — prefer the set_api_key tool)
environmentVariables.name: INTAKEQ_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Override the default IntakeQ API base URL (https://intakeq.com/api/v1)
environmentVariables.name: INTAKEQ_API_BASE

environmentVariables.description: Bearer token gate on the HTTP /mcp endpoint. Required in http mode unless MCP_ALLOW_NO_AUTH is true
environmentVariables.name: MCP_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Set to true to allow HTTP mode without MCP_API_KEY (local development only)
environmentVariables.name: MCP_ALLOW_NO_AUTH

environmentVariables.description: Base URL for HTTP transport (e.g. http://127.0.0.1:3000)
environmentVariables.name: MCP_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: HTTP listen port (default 3000). HTTP transport only.
environmentVariables.name: PORT

title: IntakeQ MCP
